properties.description: Stryker ProCuity LEX/ZX hospital bed models, part of the SmartHospital Platform acute-care product grid
Clinical communication middleware app enabling smartphone-based messaging, alerts, and workflow integration within the Vocera ecosystem
One of five SmartHospital Platform marketing pillars — covers ambient monitoring and sensor-driven environmental awareness in clinical settings
Stryker ProCuity ZMX ICU-grade hospital bed, positioned within the SmartHospital Platform connected infrastructure
One of five SmartHospital Platform marketing pillars — covers voice badges, middleware, and messaging products (Vocera stack, Sync Badge)
Parent company manufacturing and marketing the SmartHospital Platform
Stryker's connected-hospital marketing umbrella — 'operating system for modern healthcare' — bundling five pillars across SmartED, SmartRoom, SmartOR care settings
Stryker hospital bed product family including LEX/ZX (med-surg) and ZMX (ICU) models
Stryker-acquired clinical communication brand — voice badges, middleware, collaboration suite
Wearable communication badge for hospital staff enabling voice-driven clinical communication
Smartphone application for clinical communications allowing voice and messaging workflows on personal or shared devices
Patient surveillance system providing continuous ambient monitoring of patient status and room conditions
Hospital bed line with integrated smart features for patient care, safety, and clinical workflow
Hands-free wearable voice communication device for clinical staff enabling instant voice-activated calling and messaging
Medical technology company manufacturing smart hospital products
Integrated platform connecting communication, monitoring, and care devices across hospital environments
Clinical communication brand within Stryker product portfolio, originally an independent company acquired by Stryker
Clinical objective of preventing harm to patients through monitoring, communication, and workflow optimization
Voice-activated communication modality allowing clinical staff to communicate without using their hands
Operational processes and task sequences followed by healthcare staff in patient care delivery

Stryker's connected healthcare ecosystem marketed as the 'operating system for modern healthcare', spanning patient rooms through ORs with five marketing pillars: clinical communication, workflow engine, virtual care, ambient intelligence, connected infrastructure
Medical technology corporation; parent company of the Vocera product line (now Stryker Smart Care) and manufacturer of the Smart Hospital Platform
Telehealth / remote nursing system enabling remote clinical observation and interaction with patients; part of the Virtual Care pillar of the Smart Hospital Platform
Remote delivery of healthcare services via telecommunications technology; Virtual Nursing is Stryker's implementation for inpatient settings
Technology-enabled monitoring of patients outside traditional clinical settings or via remote nursing stations within a hospital
Network gateway device in the Vocera product line; provides network infrastructure connectivity for Vocera communication devices and services within the hospital
Hardware appliance that bridges communication between clinical wearable devices (Smartbadge, Sync Badge) and backend Vocera Voice Server / Collaboration Suite infrastructure
Peripheral accessories for Vocera wearable devices — includes headsets, batteries, charging stations, and lanyards primarily for the Smartbadge and Sync Badge
Hands-free wearable communication badge (previous generation); primary device that Vocera Accessories are designed to support
Current-generation hands-free wearable communication device; successor to the Vocera Smartbadge, activated via 'Okay Vocera' wake word
Main software platform for clinical communication in hospitals; provides voice, messaging, alerting, and workflow routing across Vocera devices, smartphones, and desktop clients
One of five marketing pillars of the Smart Hospital Platform; encompasses voice, messaging, alerting, and workflow-driven communication among clinical staff
Clinical communication brand acquired by Stryker; now branded as Stryker Smart Care; encompasses Smartbadge, Sync Badge, Edge, Collaboration Suite, Engage, Ease, Vina, and accessories
Marketing pillar of the Smart Hospital Platform covering telehealth, virtual nursing, and virtual monitoring capabilities
Marketing pillar of the Smart Hospital Platform covering network gateways, device connectivity, and infrastructure layer
SmartHospital Platform pillar for automation and alerting orchestration across hospital workflows
Patient and family messaging application enabling secure communication between care teams and patients/families
SmartHospital Platform pillar for IoT device integration and infrastructure connectivity across hospital environments
SmartHospital Platform pillar for telehealth and remote patient monitoring capabilities
Patient surveillance system enabling remote continuous observation of patients via video and sensor feeds
Stryker marketing umbrella for a connected hospital — positioned as the operating system for modern healthcare
Medical technology company and parent organization of the SmartHospital Platform and Vocera product lines
Stryker brand for clinical communication products including badges, messaging apps, and collaboration software
SmartHospital Platform pillar for clinical messaging, voice, and care team coordination
SmartHospital Platform pillar for ambient sensor-based monitoring and intelligence
Remote nursing presence solution enabling virtual nurse-patient interactions
